recent_calls.summary: The user, Eve from American Home Shield, called to follow up on a dispatch regarding an AC unit repair or replacement. The agent collected the dispatch number, service address, contact number, and user details before transferring the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user called and mentioned receiving a callback from a representative. The agent acknowledged this and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The agent initiated the call by asking the user for their service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The agent confirmed Johnnie King's identity and phone number, then informed him of a scheduled appointment with technician Devon at 11 AM. The user acknowledged the information and ended the call without further questions.
The user called and provided their ZIP code, then requested to speak to a live agent. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user called to follow up on a scheduled appointment and requested to speak to a live agent. The call ended abruptly after the user pressed a digit, indicating a possible transfer or hold.

Jerry Paul called to request an inspection and repair estimate for an AC unit that is running but not cooling at 126 South Overbrook Drive, Saint Charles. The agent collected detailed contact information and clarified Jerry's role as leading a home repair ministry called Hammerheads. The agent informed Jerry that no appointment slots were currently available but assured that the team would contact Glynnis directly to schedule and that Jerry wanted to be informed if the cost exceeds $300 before any work is done.
The user called to speak with someone about a follow-up concern. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Robin Stovall called to request urgent air conditioning service through American Home Shield due to the system blowing heat and not cooling, which is critical because of Robin's health condition. The agent confirmed the details and assured that someone from the team would contact Robin shortly to schedule the earliest possible appointment today. Robin declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to provide positive feedback about a recent service experience, praising the technician's politeness, promptness, and efficiency. The agent acknowledged the feedback and proceeded to transfer the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to speak with a specific representative they had previously spoken with. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and requested to speak with Shannon Gregory. The agent attempted to connect the user to the requested person and successfully transferred the call.
The agent initiated the call by asking the user for their service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.

The user called to inquire about a form they had already filled out, mentioning their work schedule as a paramedic. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user requested to speak with someone in plumbing, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate department. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called Budget asking if they were Madison Shield and inquired about a payment plan for their AC unit. The agent clarified they were Budget and transferred the user to the billing team for assistance with payment information.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent promptly transferred the call to the requested person without any issues.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent named Amy. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Vanessa called to schedule a follow-up visit for her air conditioner, which is still leaking water into her basement causing a mildew smell and potential mold. The agent confirmed her contact details and service address, assured her the team would be notified promptly, and scheduled a follow-up. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further questions.
The call was very brief with the user only stating their name and the agent greeting them. No further conversation or assistance took place before the user hung up.
The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called to inquire about the technician's arrival time. The agent confirmed the user's identity and phone number, then provided the scheduled appointment time and explained the notification process. The user was satisfied and ended the call without further questions.

The user called and had a brief, somewhat confusing interaction with the agent, who identified herself as Sophie from Budget. The user mentioned receiving a call from the same number and ended the call abruptly without requesting any services or information.
The user, Angela, requested to speak with the person who called her. The agent attempted to connect her to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed a successful call transfer.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another agent. The initial agent facilitated the transfer promptly.
The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another agent. The call lasted 17 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

Kimberly Bagley called to confirm the arrival time of the team scheduled to start work at her house, as she needed to run to the bank nearby. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Tammy called to schedule a service appointment for her air conditioner, which is not cooling properly. The agent confirmed details and booked a technician visit for the same day between 4 and 6 PM. Tammy declined to provide feedback but was satisfied with the booking process.

The user called to schedule an appointment for air conditioner service and clarified it was a standard service request, not related to a home warranty. The agent was able to communicate with the user, but the call ended abruptly before completing the appointment details.

James Nelson called to request urgent air conditioning service through American Home Shield because his AC was not cooling and he needed immediate help due to the heat and his age. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the information, and assured that the service team would contact him soon. The user was satisfied with the call and gave positive feedback.

The user contacted the agent to schedule an appointment but clarified that it was not related to home warranty or plumbing services. The user identified as the owner and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to check on an appointment time but the agent was unable to find any appointment under the user's information. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the call was successfully transferred.
The user repeatedly requested to speak with an agent for scheduling. The agent attempted to clarify the request but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to schedule an appointment for an air conditioner inspection but the call ended abruptly after the user asked if the agent was still there. The agent confirmed the user's ZIP code and asked how to assist, but the conversation was cut off before completion.

The user requested to speak with someone from the office, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was completed successfully within a short call duration.

The user called to check if their technician was on the way. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent who could provide that information. The call was successfully transferred shortly after the user's request.
The user called to confirm that their technician was on the way. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

Han Pham called to request that Rich add the cost of moving the boiler five feet away from the wall and then back to its original position to his estimate, due to an urgent foundation work schedule. The agent documented the request, flagged it as urgent, and informed Han that the team will follow up on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from Han.

The user, Joaquin Gilbert, requested an AC diagnostic for a leaking unit at his home and preferred an appointment before noon any day this week. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the user's interest in home maintenance programs, and scheduled a follow-up from the team. The user provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to cancel an appointment and the after-hours assistant noted the cancellation request, informing the user that the team will follow up to confirm it on the next business day. The user declined any further assistance and ended the call politely.

The user called to add important health information and a request for prioritization to their existing work order. The agent confirmed the updates, including the system being turned off for 24 hours, and assured the user that the team would follow up on the next business day. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.

Lauren called in response to a call from Budget to schedule a service for her air conditioner. She clarified that the issue is not an emergency and can be handled during a regular appointment, and she is flexible with the timing. The agent confirmed the details and planned to have the team follow up on the next business day to schedule the service.

Greg Parks called to confirm his recently submitted service claim and requested the earliest available regular cooling service appointment for his air conditioner, which is not working. The AI assistant noted his details and informed him that the team will follow up on the next business day to finalize scheduling. Greg declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Melanie Zellick called to report that her air conditioner is not working, likely due to a failed compressor, and she has elderly people in the home, making it an emergency. The agent documented the issue, flagged it as urgent, and informed Melanie that the team will contact her on the next business day since it is after hours. Melanie confirmed her address and phone number and declined further assistance.

Joshua called to report that a previous repair had failed again and requested immediate assistance due to no air conditioning and having small children in a hot environment. The agent documented the urgent issue and informed Joshua that a representative would contact him on the next business day, Monday after 8 AM. The call ended with the agent confirming the follow-up and no further assistance requested.
